title: Describe a photo
subtitle: Use hay, está, es to describe what you see.
overview: Photo description is excellent speaking practice.
Use hay for what exists, está for location, es for description.

sections.title: Photo frames
rows: Hay una persona en la foto.
There is a person in the photo.
La persona está en una cocina.
The person is in a kitchen.
Hay una mesa y dos sillas.
There is a table and two chairs.

items.es: En la foto hay una familia.
items.en: In the photo there is a family.
There is food on the table.
